key.name: last-known-state
key.description: Result of the last completed up/down action: 'on' or 'off'. Restored at session start; never queried from Docker.

key.name: last-result-timestamp
key.summary: Unix timestamp of the last confirmed result
key.description: When the last up/down action completed. 0 means no action has ever completed. Shown to the user so the "last result" display contract stays legible.
